title: Replay Governance Decision
description: Governed artifact produced by the BY Replay Governance Gate (BAA). Consumes a replay_decision_analysis artifact and emits an enforceable system_response governing downstream execution and promotion decisions. Replay drift is no longer advisory telemetry — it is an operational control signal with trace linkage, independence enforcement, environment reproducibility, and SLO hook support.

artifact_type.description: Identifies this artifact as a replay governance decision. Must always equal 'replay_governance_decision'.

replay_analysis_artifact_id.description: The analysis_id from the replay_decision_analysis artifact consumed by this gate. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

run_id.description: Identifier of the pipeline run being governed.

evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this governance decision was evaluated.

replay_status.description: The replay consistency status from the consumed replay_decision_analysis artifact. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

replay_consistency_sli.description: The reproducibility_score from the replay_decision_analysis artifact mapped to a replay consistency SLI in [0, 1]. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

governance_policy.description: The governance policy applied to produce this decision.

policy_name.description: Name of the governance policy in effect.

policy_version.description: Semver version of the governance policy.

drift_action.description: System response applied when replay_status is 'drifted'.

indeterminate_action.description: System response applied when replay_status is 'indeterminate'.

missing_replay_action.description: System response applied when no replay artifact is present and replay is not required.

require_replay.description: When true, a missing replay artifact is treated as a policy violation using missing_replay_action.

consistency_sli_rebuild_threshold.description: BAA: SLI threshold below which a full rebuild is required. When replay_consistency_sli < this value the system_response escalates to require_rebuild (block). Optional; defaults to 0.5 when not set.

consistency_sli_review_threshold.description: BAA: SLI threshold below which human review is required. When replay_consistency_sli < this value (but >= rebuild threshold) the system_response escalates to require_review. Optional; defaults to 0.8 when not set.

decision.description: The enforceable governance decision emitted by this gate.

system_response.description: The enforceable system response. allow=execution may continue; require_review=must not proceed automatically; quarantine=must not promote/publish; block=execution must stop.

severity.description: Severity level corresponding to the system_response.

replay_governed.description: True when the decision was driven by replay governance (replay artifact was present and valid). False when replay was absent and not required.

rationale_code.description: Machine-readable code explaining the basis for this governance decision.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the governance decision.

enforcement_reason.description: Structured explanation of why this enforcement decision was reached.

summary.description: One-line summary of the enforcement reasoning.

details.description: Ordered list of detail strings explaining the enforcement decision.

status.description: Operational status of this governance artifact. ok=produced normally; invalid_input=replay artifact was malformed; policy_blocked=policy explicitly blocked.

trace_id.description: BAA: Trace identifier linking this governance decision to the full execution trace. Required when replay_governed=true.

original_run_id.description: BAA: Identifier of the original pipeline run that was replayed. Required when replay_governed=true.

replay_run_id.description: BAA: Identifier of the replay pipeline run. Required when replay_governed=true.

replay_artifact_ids.description: BAA: List of artifact IDs produced during the replay run. Required when replay_governed=true.

replay_decision_status.description: BAA: High-level replay decision outcome. pass=replay consistent with original; drift=replay diverged from original; indeterminate=reproducibility could not be confirmed. Required when replay_governed=true. Must influence final decision status — no silent pass-through.

replay_validation_mode.description: BAA: Whether the replay execution path is independent (separate function/module) or shared with the original. independent mode is required for high-severity decisions. Optional; block if absent and decision severity is critical.

environment_context.description: BAA: Environment reproducibility contract. Captures runtime environment details for the replay run. When present, compared against original run environment to detect drift.

seed_rng_state.description: Random seed or RNG state snapshot used in the replay run. Null when not applicable.

replay_drift_event.description: BAA: Structured drift event emitted when replay_decision_status is 'drift'. Used to feed the error budget governor and replay_failure_rate metric.

trace_id.description: Trace ID for correlation with trace spans.

replay_decision_status.description: Replay decision status at the time the event was emitted.

replay_consistency_sli.description: Replay consistency SLI at the time the event was emitted.

drift_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the drift event.

emitted_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the event was emitted.
